Needham and Sons Transport is a veteran owned, family operated, professional freight and cargo dispatching service homeported in Conway, Missouri serving at home and nationwide. We offer services that treat your business, equipment and your family as if it were our own. Our goal is to consistently be a source of trust for you, your family and your business.

Our Services

Our Dispatch Services
Are Built to Move You

Whether you're a small independent owner-operator or an established fleet looking for a more organized approach, we handle the paperwork in the background while you focus on the road ahead.

Load Finding & Booking

We understand that the best loads aren't always on the load board. We work with brokers around the country and negotiate prices on your behalf. A truck that doesn't move, doesn't bring income.

Paperwork & Compliance

Rate confirmations, BOLs, PODs, and full MC/DOT compliance support — we handle the paperwork so it's done right and done fast.

Route Optimization

We factor in live fuel pricing across the country and model every trip around your specific equipment specifications — so your routes are optimized for your truck, not just any truck. Less wasted miles, lower fuel costs, and more money in your pocket on every run.

About Us

Who We Are &
Why It Matters

01
No Load, No Fee

We only get paid when you get paid. No monthly retainers, no hidden charges — our success is tied directly to yours.

02
Dedicated Dispatcher

One person who knows your truck, your lanes, and your preferences. Not a call center — a real partner who picks up the phone.

03
Family First

We treat your business and your family like our own. That's not a slogan — it's the standard we hold ourselves to on every single load.

How It Works

On the Road in 4 Steps

Getting started is simple. We keep it that way on purpose.

01
Tell Us About Your Truck

Fill out a quick form with your equipment type, preferred lanes, and availability. No commitment needed.

02
Meet Your Dispatcher

We match you with a dedicated dispatcher who knows your freight type and your territory inside and out.

03
We Find Your Loads

Your dispatcher searches load boards, negotiates rates, and sends you vetted options — you approve, we book.

04
Roll & Get Paid

We handle the paperwork, track your load, and follow up on payment. You stay focused on the road.

Drive With Us

Owner-Operators &
Fleets Welcome

Whether you're running solo or managing multiple trucks, Needham & Sons has the resources, relationships, and experience to keep you moving profitably.

All Equipment Types

Dry van, flatbed, reefer, step deck, tanker — we work with it all.

No Forced Dispatch

You're always in control. We present options — you make the call.

Weekly Pay

Fast invoicing and payment tracking so your cash flow stays strong.

24/7 Support

Something comes up on the road? We're available around the clock.
